---
species: "Hildenbrandia rubra"
accepted_code: "HIRU"
alternate_codes: []
diminutive: ""
alternate_diminutives: ["", ""]
common_name: "Red encrusting algae"
field_id_possible:
  - yes
date: ""
date-format: " "
description: "Encrusting calcareous/hard red algae"
image: '/header_images/hildenbrandia_rubra_inaturalist.jpg'
categories:
  - red algal crusts
sampling_programs:
    - keen_quad
    - keen_upc
    - bhi_quadrat
    - lsw_quad
    - lsw_microquad
habitat:
  - intertidal
  - subtidal
mobility:
  - sessile
sampling_region:
  - GOM
  - Virginian
catami_code: 80300929
catami_version: "1.4"
worms_code: 145712
---

![](/header_images/hildenbrandia_rubra_inaturalist.jpg)
PHOTO CREDIT: https://www.inaturalist.org/taxa/183033-Hildenbrandia-rubra

**Other images:** '/images/hiru_2.jpg'
<br/>

**Distinguishing features:** Deep red or brown-ish crust growing synonymous to rocks or hard surfaces. Very thin and without surface markings.
<br/>

**Easily confused species and differentiation:** URFC

<br/>

**Extended Description:** <!-- Extended description -->

**[WORMS page]https://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=taxdetails&id=145712#images**
